rationale: Carry the OANC ANC 6/8F profile's public website, freshness metadata, and explicit display-label caveat onto canonical ANC 8F. DCGIS identifies the commission as 8F and supplies the boundary/SMD identifiers, while OANC presents the same public profile as ANC 6/8F spanning Wards 6 and 8. Alpha keeps the DCGIS canonical ID/name and preserves the OANC label as source evidence instead of silently overwriting either source.

attributes.description: DCGIS identifies this Advisory Neighborhood Commission as ANC 8F. OANC presents the public profile and ward listing as ANC 6/8F spanning Wards 6 and 8; alpha keeps the DCGIS canonical ID/name while preserving the OANC display label as source evidence.
